docs.title: Handle idempotency
docs.preview: How-to Handle idempotency Network failures and timeouts make it unsafe to retry a write blindly. The Study API uses an Idempotency-Key contract so a retried POST returns the original outcome instead of duplicating work. Why it matters Witho
